result.stdout:
Description:
  Tools for generating COM-related code

Usage:
  Coplt.Com2 [command] [options]

Options:
  -c, --config <config>  Configuration file [default: ./co_com.json]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
  -v, --version          Show version information

Commands:
  new <path>  new default config.json [default: ./co_com.json]
